# Default Player Avatars Folder

Place default avatar images in this directory. The application looks for an image named exactly after the player's name (with a `.jpg` extension) if they haven't uploaded a custom one.

## Example
If a player is named `Tanner`, their default image should be named:
`Tanner.jpg`

If the file does not exist, the application will automatically fall back to the standard initials letter placeholder or the roundtable shield.
